chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 337 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ شَابَ شَيْبَةً فِي اَلْإِسْلاَمِ كَانَتْ لَهُ نُوراً يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.337 - Imam (as) said: "Whoever grows a gray hair in Islam, it will be a light for them on the Day of Judgment."
